normalized_title: Melville City Centre Structure Plan (Activity Centre Structure Plan, Booragoon)
version_date: 26 March 2015 (version 6; adopted by WAPC 22 April 2014, Council resolution 9 December 2013, Modification 1 endorsed by Council 5 March 2015)
scope_summary: Activity centre structure plan for the Melville City Centre at Booragoon (Garden City), the designated Secondary Centre under SPP 4.2, prepared under the City of Melville Community Planning Scheme No. 5. Part One (statutory) controls land use permissibility, caps shop-retail floorspace at 120,000 m2 NLA and non-retail commercial at 55,000 m2 NLA, and sets built-form standards (minimum 2-storey height, upper-level street setbacks, R100 density in the Centre Frame Precincts) for the Centre Core and Centre Frame, expressly varying the Scheme and disapplying several R-Codes design elements (density except Centre Frame, site coverage, plot ratio, open space, building height).

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: structure plan area (excluding eating and entertainment uses)
structure plan area (excluding eating and entertainment uses)

key_numeric_standards.topic: residential yield linked to retail expansion
key_numeric_standards.unit: dwellings per 1,000 m2 additional retail NLA

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: all development across the structure plan area

key_numeric_standards.topic: site cover / plot ratio / open space

key_numeric_standards.unit: m from building line of 4th storey
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: any level above 4 storeys facing a gazetted public street (Centre Core)
Centre Frame Precincts A and B

key_numeric_standards.value: 3 storeys / 12 m above natural ground level
4 storeys / 16 m above natural ground level (within 20 m of Almondbury, Riseley or Marmion Street lot boundary)
3 storeys / 12 m above natural ground level (not within 12 m of a property outside the structure plan area)
2 storeys / 9 m above natural ground level
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: all other development in Centre Frame Precinct B

key_numeric_standards.value: street setbacks may be nil; side setbacks per R-100 R-Codes provisions; nil to two side boundaries up to 2 storeys
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: Centre Frame Precincts A and B

key_numeric_standards.topic: rear setback to lots outside structure plan area
private open space (terrace, balcony or courtyard)

key_numeric_standards.value: R-100 provisions within Centre Frame; R40 grouped housing provisions to lots outside
assessed at R40 zoning solar access requirements of the R-Codes
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: Centre Frame development overshadowing land outside the Precincts

definitions: storey (floors 50%+ below natural ground level excluded from storey count but included in height in metres, cl 10.4.7)

quality_flags: Two-column PDF extraction interleaves columns, so many lines mix text from adjacent clauses; clause-level reading requires care
Prepared under the superseded Community Planning Scheme No. 5; current effect under LPS6 and the 10-year structure plan effect rule in the LPS Regulations cannot be verified from the text
Centre Core building heights are set by the Building Height Plan (Plan 3), a drawing whose values are not recoverable from the extracted text
